title: Promotions
desc: Take advantage of our current promotion: our lowest monthly maintenance subscription plan. This affordable service helps keep your HVAC, plumbing, and electrical systems running smoothly year-round with routine maintenance, priority service, and preventive care. It’s the easiest way to reduce breakdowns, extend equipment life, and save on costly repairs. Available for homes and businesses across the GTA.

# Peace of Mind Starts at Just \$11.99 per Month

Taking care of your home should feel simple and stress free. With QuickFast’s maintenance plans, you can stay ahead of costly repairs while keeping your home comfortable in every season. Our experienced technicians provide routine inspections, system tune ups, and reliable support whenever you need it. You also benefit from priority service and savings on repairs, making it easier to manage your home expenses. Choose the plan that fits your needs and let us handle the maintenance so you can focus on what matters most.

[INQUIRE TODAY](https://www.quickfast.ca/contact-us)

![1.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_f8b8019eaad54200afbd3b4a0a694705~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_14,y_0,w_1974,h_1161/fill/w_980,h_783,al_c,q_90,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/1.png)

## Start Your Protection Plan Today!

Do not wait for a costly breakdown to take action. Contact QuickFast today to enroll in a maintenance plan that protects your home and saves you money. Our team will walk you through your options and get you set up quickly so you can enjoy reliable comfort and peace of mind.
